steps.title: Identify the given slope
steps.content:
Line $t$ is in slope-intercept form:
$$y=-\frac{1}{5}x+18$$
So the slope of line $t$ is $-\frac{1}{5}$.

steps.title: Use perpendicular slopes
steps.content:
Perpendicular slopes are negative reciprocals. The negative reciprocal of $-\frac{1}{5}$ is:
$$5$$

steps.title: Choose the slope
steps.content: The slope of line $s$ is $5$, matching the option with that slope. The answer is B.
